title: Foundation
description: Core computer science and game internals knowledge required before reverse engineering games.

description: Modern C++ concepts essential for understanding compiled game code.

title: Reverse Engineering
description: Static and dynamic analysis techniques for understanding binaries.

title: Assembly
description: Deep dive into x86/x64 assembly for game reverse engineering.

title: Debugging
description: Master debuggers for dynamic game analysis.

title: Windows Internals
description: Deep Windows OS knowledge for security and RE research.

title: Memory Analysis
description: Techniques for reading, scanning, and interpreting game memory.

title: Cheat Engine Mastery
description: Complete Cheat Engine workflow for educational game analysis.

title: Graphics Fundamentals
description: GPU APIs, render pipelines, and graphics debugging.

title: Anti-Cheat Research
description: Understanding anti-cheat architecture for defensive security research. Educational focus only — no bypass instructions.

title: Networking
description: Game network protocols and packet analysis.

title: Game Security Research
description: Client trust, authority models, and secure game design.
